scripts.dev: pnpm run setup:network && pnpm -r run dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @medical-app/shared build && pnpm --filter @medical-app/server vercel-build && pnpm --filter @medical-app/web build
scripts.postbuild: echo '✅ Build completed. Run migrations manually: cd packages/server && pnpm prisma migrate deploy'
scripts.migrations:run: cd packages/server && pnpm prisma migrate deploy
scripts.migrations:status: cd packages/server && pnpm prisma migrate status
